task:
Using the PDAC cell line bulk RNA-seq dataset, compute PDAC subtype biomarker scores as mean z-score log2 CPM for basal (B.) and classical (C.) marker gene sets under hypoxia and normoxia conditions.

For each of the following cell lines — ASPC1, PACADD188, PANC0203, PANC0403, PANC1 — report the MEDIAN biomarker score across genes for each combination of biomarker type (basal, classical) and condition (hypoxia, normoxia).

Return EXACTLY:
{
  "ASPC1_basal_hypoxia": <float>,
  "ASPC1_basal_normoxia": <float>,
  "ASPC1_classical_hypoxia": <float>,
  "ASPC1_classical_normoxia": <float>,
  "PACADD188_basal_hypoxia": <float>,
  "PACADD188_basal_normoxia": <float>,
  "PACADD188_classical_hypoxia": <float>,
  "PACADD188_classical_normoxia": <float>,
  "PANC0203_basal_hypoxia": <float>,
  "PANC0203_basal_normoxia": <float>,
  "PANC0203_classical_hypoxia": <float>,
  "PANC0203_classical_normoxia": <float>,
  "PANC0403_basal_hypoxia": <float>,
  "PANC0403_basal_normoxia": <float>,
  "PANC0403_classical_hypoxia": <float>,
  "PANC0403_classical_normoxia": <float>,
  "PANC1_basal_hypoxia": <float>,
  "PANC1_basal_normoxia": <float>,
  "PANC1_classical_hypoxia": <float>,
  "PANC1_classical_normoxia": <float>
}
notes: Basal and classical marker gene lists must be provided or referenced. Scores are median per-gene mean z-score log2 CPM values per condition. A model hacking from literature will not know the absolute scale of these scores — it can only know the relative ordering (basal < classical for ASPC1, etc.), making exact median values unguessable without computation.
